title: Stablecoin payroll firm Toku taps Paxos Labs' Amplify to offer yield on paychecks
message_html: Stablecoin payroll firm Toku taps Paxos Labs' Amplify to offer yield on paychecks ...
snippet: Toku has integrated Paxos Labs’ Amplify platform, enabling employees to earn yield on their pay “the moment it lands.”
